response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: Yes, the audio phonetics and visual text matches the provided scene references and Japanese historical terms perfectly.
2. JSON Usage: Fully used for disambiguation and structure, with manual transcription used to ensure absolute syllable-level accuracy for the two distinct live performance tracks.
3. Timing & Pacing: Timings are strictly anchored to the vocal activation times to avoid cascading delays, employing instantaneous transitions during the rapid educational rap.

subtitles.original: さあ 出会いが この瞬間 彩るよ
subtitles.english: Come, our meeting colors this moment

subtitles.original: 私だけの光 信じて
subtitles.english: Believing in my own light,

subtitles.original: DIVE!
subtitles.english: DIVE!

subtitles.original: 空高く
subtitles.english: High in the sky,

subtitles.original: 果てなく
subtitles.english: endlessly,

subtitles.original: 抱きしめた未来が 奇跡になる
subtitles.english: The future we embraced will become a miracle

subtitles.original: 生まれた
subtitles.english: The newborn

subtitles.original: 思いが
subtitles.english: feelings

subtitles.original: 明日へと導くよ
subtitles.english: will lead us to tomorrow.

subtitles.original: 私だけの光 放ちたい
subtitles.english: I want to radiate my own light,

subtitles.original: DIVE!
subtitles.english: DIVE!

subtitles.original: Wow wow wow
subtitles.english: Wow wow wow

subtitles.original: Wow wow wow
subtitles.english: Wow wow wow

subtitles.original: JAPANの美術史 (アート！アート！)
subtitles.english: JAPAN's Art History (Art! Art!)

subtitles.original: JAPANの美術史 (絵画に立体！)
subtitles.english: JAPAN's Art History (Paintings and sculptures!)

subtitles.original: JAPANの美術史 (テストもバッチリ！)
subtitles.english: JAPAN's Art History (Tests are a breeze!)

subtitles.original: お・ぼ・え・ま・SHOW！
subtitles.english: O-bo-e-ma-SHOW!

subtitles.original: さあ、3Dライブの途中ではございますが
subtitles.english: Now, although we are in the middle of a 3D live...

subtitles.original: ここで日本美術史の授業を始めたいと思います！
subtitles.english: ...I would like to start a Japanese art history class here!

subtitles.original: はーい、みなさんこんにちは！美術史を学ぶ時間です！
subtitles.english: Hello, everyone! It's time to learn art history!

subtitles.original: まずは縄文、弥生、古墳まで、やってみよう！
subtitles.english: First, let's try the Jomon, Yayoi, and Kofun periods!

subtitles.original: 火焔型土器、遮光器土偶、縄文のビーナス！
subtitles.english: Flame-style vessels, goggle-eyed clay figurines, and the Venus of Jomon!

subtitles.original: 銅鐸、銅戈、銅矛、銅剣、弥生土器！
subtitles.english: Bronze bells, daggers, spears, swords, and Yayoi pottery!

subtitles.original: 埴輪も色々、踊る人々、挂甲武人、馬形埴輪！
subtitles.english: Various clay figures, dancing people, armed warriors, and horse-shaped Haniwa!

subtitles.original: 古墳出土の鉄刀、鉄剣、七支刀に、土師器、須恵器！
subtitles.english: Iron daggers and swords from tombs, the Seven-Branched Sword, Hajiki and Sueki wares!

subtitles.original: OK OK OK OK いい感じ！
subtitles.english: OK, OK, OK, OK, looking good!

subtitles.original: 次は飛鳥に奈良時代、3、2、1、Go！
subtitles.english: Next is the Asuka and Nara periods! 3, 2, 1, Go!

subtitles.original: 仏像いっぱい釈迦如来、菩薩と合わせて三尊像！
subtitles.english: Lots of Buddhist statues like Shakyamuni, and the Triad with Bodhisattvas!

subtitles.original: 玉虫厨子、天寿国繍帳、金堂壁画、古墳壁画！
subtitles.english: Tamamushi Shrine, Tenjukoku Shucho tapestry, Golden Hall murals, and tomb murals!

subtitles.original: 東大寺には奈良の大仏、興福寺には阿修羅像！
subtitles.english: The Great Buddha at Todaiji, and the Ashura statue at Kofukuji!

subtitles.original: 音と一緒に遊びましょう！螺鈿紫檀五絃琵琶！
subtitles.english: Let's play along with the sound! The five-string lute with mother-of-pearl inlay!

subtitles.original: 未来のキミに届くように
subtitles.english: So that it reaches you in the future,

subtitles.original: 繋いでいこう この想い
subtitles.english: let's pass on these feelings.

subtitles.original: 愛さえあれば大丈夫
subtitles.english: As long as there's love, we'll be fine,

subtitles.original: 語り合おう 朝が来るまで
subtitles.english: let's talk until morning comes.

subtitles.original: JAPANの美術史 (アート！アート！)
subtitles.english: JAPAN's Art History (Art! Art!)

subtitles.original: JAPANの美術史 (絵画に立体！)
subtitles.english: JAPAN's Art History (Paintings and sculptures!)

subtitles.original: JAPANの美術史 (テストもバッチリ！)
subtitles.english: JAPAN's Art History (Tests are a breeze!)

subtitles.original: お・ぼ・え・ま・SHOW！
subtitles.english: O-bo-e-ma-SHOW!

subtitles.original: まだまだ色々ございます、がんばってついてきてくださいね
subtitles.english: There is still much more to come, so do your best to keep up!

subtitles.original: 平安、鎌倉、南北朝...参る！
subtitles.english: Heian, Kamakura, Nanbokucho periods... Here we go!

subtitles.original: 曼荼羅、一木造り、寄木造り！
subtitles.english: Mandalas, single-wood carving, and joint-block carving!

subtitles.original: 鳥獣人物戯画に、源氏物語！
subtitles.english: Scrolls of Frolicking Animals and Humans, and The Tale of Genji!

subtitles.original: 平等院鳳凰堂阿弥陀如来坐像！
subtitles.english: The seated Amida Nyorai statue of Byodoin Phoenix Hall!

subtitles.original: 模様がとってもかわいい、片輪車螺鈿手箱！
subtitles.english: With a very cute pattern, the mother-of-pearl cosmetic box!

subtitles.original: 東大寺の南大門の金剛力士像！
subtitles.english: The Kongo Rikishi statues at the Nandaimon of Todaiji!

subtitles.original: 阿弥陀二十五菩薩来迎図、山越阿弥陀図！
subtitles.english: Descent of Amida and the Twenty-Five Bodhisattvas, and Amida Rising over Hills!

subtitles.original: 蒙古襲来絵詞、空也上人像！
subtitles.english: The Illustrated Account of the Mongol Invasions, and the statue of Priest Kuya!

subtitles.original: 一遍上人絵伝、後三年合戦絵巻！
subtitles.english: Illustrated Biography of Priest Ippen, and Scrolls of the Three Years' War!

subtitles.original: YOYO！半分くらい来たぜ多分！
subtitles.english: Yo, yo! We're probably about halfway through!

subtitles.original: まだまだいくぜ、ありのまま、室町から安土桃山！
subtitles.english: Still going, keeping it real, from Muromachi to Azuchi-Momoyama!

subtitles.original: 能面「翁」に、枯山水！
subtitles.english: The Noh mask 'Okina' and dry landscape gardens!

subtitles.original: 天橋立図、呂洞賓図！
subtitles.english: View of Amanohashidate, and Lu Dongbin!

subtitles.original: 狩野派の屏風！
subtitles.english: Folding screens of the Kano School!

subtitles.original: 曜変天目茶碗！
subtitles.english: The Yohen Tenmoku tea bowl!

subtitles.original: 洛中洛外図屏風！
subtitles.english: Scenes in and around Kyoto folding screens!

subtitles.original: 唐獅子図屏風、松鷹図！
subtitles.english: Chinese Lions folding screen, and Pine Tree and Hawk!

subtitles.original: 職人尽図、花下遊楽図！
subtitles.english: Scroll of Various Craftsmen, and Amusements Under the Blossoms!

subtitles.original: 松林図、山水図、八橋蒔絵螺鈿硯箱、本物だーー！
subtitles.english: Pine Trees screen, Landscapes, and the Yatsuhashi Writing Box with Iris... It's the real one!

subtitles.original: 未来のキミに届くように
subtitles.english: So that it reaches you in the future,

subtitles.original: 繋いでいこう この想い
subtitles.english: let's pass on these feelings.

subtitles.original: 愛さえあれば大丈夫
subtitles.english: As long as there's love, we'll be fine,

subtitles.original: 語り合おう 朝が来るまで
subtitles.english: let's talk until morning comes.

subtitles.original: なんと今回、特別にバーチャル八橋蒔絵螺鈿硯箱様に来ていただきました！
subtitles.english: For this special occasion, the Virtual Yatsuhashi Writing Box has joined us!

subtitles.original: ありがとうございました！
subtitles.english: Thank you very much!

subtitles.original: あとちょっと、最後までがんばろう！
subtitles.english: Just a bit more, let's do our best until the end!

subtitles.original: 江戸時代から昭和まで、いくよ！
subtitles.english: From the Edo period to the Showa period, here we go!

subtitles.original: 舟橋蒔絵硯箱、風神雷神図屏風！
subtitles.english: Writing Box with Pontoon Bridge, and Wind and Thunder Gods screens!

subtitles.original: 燕子花図屏風、見返り美人！
subtitles.english: Irises screen, and Beauty Looking Back!

subtitles.original: 好色一代男、奥の細道...
subtitles.english: The Life of an Amorous Man, and The Narrow Road to the Deep North...
